## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Miki Cisic (HockeyStack) and Erik O'Brien (growthx.ai) to discuss GEO/SEO strategy and align on approach.](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX uses an audience-centric approach, creating detailed personas and company context to inform content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Current output: 5 blog posts/month; aim to increase to 5/week using Atlas platform for content generation and LLM visibility tracking](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [HockeyStack not currently ranking for key terms like "Dark Funnel"; opportunity for significant visibility improvement (6-24x growth potential)](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [Miki to join weekly strategy calls, provide customer insights, and share JSON file implementation video from previous experience](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Content Strategy Approach

  - [Audience-centric: Deep dive into personas (CMOs, CROs, VP of RevOps)](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Create artifacts: Audience personas, company context, writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Use Atlas platform for content generation (5 posts/week goal)](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Focus on middle and bottom of funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Monitor 100-200 queries using Scrunch for LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Adjust strategy weekly based on performance and competitor analysis](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Technical SEO Implementation

  - [GrowthX handles site structure recommendations and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [Ensures content is visible and crawlable by LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Potential to implement JSON files for improved meta-content (Miki to share video)](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO opportunities explored after initial 8-week strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)

### Current Focus Areas for HockeyStack

  - [Shift from solely attribution to broader go-to-market intelligence](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Key topic clusters: Go-to-market account intelligence, marketing attribution, anonymous buyer tracking, revenue ops, marketing data integration](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [Specific focus needed on "Dark Funnel" visibility (currently not ranking)](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)

### Reporting and Analytics

  - [GrowthX to provide reports similar to Profound's, showing:](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
      - [Brand visibility ranking vs. competitors](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
      - [Platform-specific visibility (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Copilot)](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
      - [Topic coverage and sentiment analysis](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [Looker dashboard for Google Search Console and analytics reporting](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)

### Collaboration and Communication

  - [Weekly strategy calls on Thursdays at 11:30 AM Pacific](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Slack channel for ongoing communication](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)
  - [Miki to join calls when possible, provide customer insights](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Erik to add Miki to weekly strategy calls and Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
  - [Share keyword research and blog topic ideas by Tuesday](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
  - [Miki to send video on JSON file implementation for GEO](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [GrowthX to compile and share initial keyword/term list for optimization](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [Begin tracking and improving HockeyStack's ranking for "Dark Funnel" and related terms](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [Set up and share Scrunch dashboard view for visibility tracking](https://fathom.video/share/RESs8vLD5AQ-sRnpiuAA4YWoKPLUPPgk?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
